summary: Midnight cycle. v2.8.5 released (report_intent allow rule + self-mod invariant scoping + --store none fix). #1182 resolved. 7 issues closed (4 report_intent duplicates, #1177 already-fixed, 3 informational). PR queue is clean (0 open PRs). P0 swarm health (#1186) persists — human intervention still required. P1 blockers: KE-2 (#917, 3rd cycle unstarted), AAB normalization gap (#1202, ~700 unintended denials/day), heredoc false-positive (#1208, PR #1213 closed without merging). New dogfood pattern: rtk-prefixed commands misclassified as unknown — impacts our own tooling.

drift.agentguardCloud: 5 versions behind — P2. Missing: report_intent allow rule, self-mod invariant scoping, --store none fix, graceful SQLite fallback, commit-scope-guard.

agentGuard.notes: Queue clean. Confirm with studio-em whether PR #1150 is still active or can be closed.

dogfoodPatterns.fix: PR #1212 — agent.report_intent and agent.internal added to agentguard.yaml allow list. Released v2.8.5 (2026-03-28T11:01Z). Issues closed this cycle.
dogfoodPatterns.note: Agents on pre-2.8.5 CLI will continue to see this. copilot-init re-run needed to pick up new hooks.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: Heredoc with governance path strings triggers false-positive self-mod block
dogfoodPatterns.description: commandViolation at definitions.ts:1229 scans full command string including heredoc body. PR #1213 (per-token scanning + heredoc-body stripping) closed without merging at 11:21 due to conflicts with #1212.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: kernel-squad-developer: re-implement from closed PR #1213. Strip content after heredoc marker before governance path scanning.

dogfoodPatterns.pattern: MCP server sub-tool names fail exact policy match
dogfoodPatterns.description: github-mcp-server-actions_list blocked despite allow rule for github-mcp-server. AAB uses exact-match for MCP targets.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: kernel-squad-developer: use startsWith() in aab.ts MCP target matching. ~1h effort.

dogfoodPatterns.description: rtk git merge → classified as unknown (not git.merge). AAB doesn't strip tool-wrapper prefixes. Directly impacts our own dev workflow.
dogfoodPatterns.impact: 64 false denials for rtk-prefixed git commands. 3,825 total unknown-type denials in 5.5 days.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: kernel-squad-developer: strip known wrappers [rtk, time, timeout, strace] before AAB pattern matching. Quick partial fix before KE-2 full solution.

dogfoodPatterns.description: Copilot-driver agents report version unknown in governance telemetry.
dogfoodPatterns.recommendation: copilot-init should set AGENTGUARD_AGENT_VERSION env var.

crossCuttingIssues.title: Swarm Health P0 — 3rd consecutive cycle
crossCuttingIssues.description: 85.7% agents stuck. 133 enabled agents vs 32 max_workers (4× oversubscribed). Human required.
crossCuttingIssues.action: Escalated to director. No change this cycle.

crossCuttingIssues.title: KE-2: ActionContext — 3rd cycle unstarted
crossCuttingIssues.description: 0/4 checkboxes, no PR, no assignee. v3.0 critical path. Root cause for AAB normalization gap (#1202).
crossCuttingIssues.action: Re-escalated to kernel-sr. If no PR by 2026-03-29T06:00Z, escalate to director as v3.0 risk.

crossCuttingIssues.title: AAB normalization gap — ~700 unintended denials/day
crossCuttingIssues.description: Inflates denial rate to 18.2% (real intentional ~11%). rtk prefix stripping is quick win; KE-2 is full solution.
crossCuttingIssues.action: kernel-squad-developer: rtk prefix stripping. kernel-sr: KE-2 unblock.

crossCuttingIssues.title: 149 orphaned branches
crossCuttingIssues.action: workspace-backlog-steward sprint or human batch cleanup.

escalations.reason: Swarm health #1186: 3rd cycle, 85.7% stuck. 133 agents vs 32 max_workers. Needs: git worktree prune, /tmp/ PID cleanup, cron daemon restart, capacity reduction.
KE-2 (#917) unstarted 3rd cycle. v3.0 blocked. If no PR by 2026-03-29T06:00Z, escalate to director.
Two quick fixes: (1) #1209 MCP prefix match in aab.ts (~1h), (2) #1208 heredoc body stripping, re-implement from closed PR #1213 (~2h). Together eliminate ~100 false denials/day.
agentguard-cloud at 2.8.0, 5 versions behind 2.8.5. Copilot agents in cloud context still denied for report_intent.

sprintStatus.goal: Validate Go kernel→Cloud telemetry E2E pipeline (workspace #60, due Apr 17). KE-2 unblock, swarm health resolution.
sprintStatus.progress: v2.8.5 released with key reliability fixes. #1182 resolved. Dogfood backlog partially cleared. KE-2 0% — highest sprint risk. #1202 (AAB normalization) is new systemic issue.
blockers: Swarm health P0 (#1186) — human required, 3rd cycle
KE-2 (#917) — 3rd cycle unstarted, v3.0 critical path
Heredoc false-positive (#1208) — PR #1213 closed, follow-up needed

actionsThisCycle.reason: github.pr.* rules present in both repos

healthRationale: Yellow (downgraded from red): v2.8.5 released, #1182 resolved, CI green, queue clean. Still yellow: P0 swarm persists, KE-2 stalling 3rd cycle, AAB producing ~700 unintended denials/day, heredoc fix lost when #1213 closed. Back to red if KE-2 has no PR by next cycle.
